Import New Month
Upload your two Drip export files and this tool will automatically follow the Monthly Email Report instructions — producing a filtered report, a full report, and saving the month to the database.

1 Drip RAW Email Metrics CSV

Export from Drip → Broadcasts → Export metrics
Needs columns: id, strategy_name, email_subject, sent_at, open_rate, click_through_rate

Drop file here or click to browse

Drip email metrics export (.csv or .xlsx) — or drop a combined monthly xlsx to auto-fill both fields

2 Last Touch Attribution CSV

From CRM / Sales tracking — last email before conversion
Needs columns: Last Marketing Term, Sum of OKUPDR?, Sum of Demo was Set, Sum of Converted

Drop file here or click to browse

Last touch attribution export (.csv or .xlsx)
Upload both files to continue.
✅ Filtered Report (stakeholder version)
📋 Full Report (all emails including intl/demo)

📂 Load Email History

Upload any of these files to populate the database — all emails are added automatically, existing data is preserved (no duplicates).

Supported files:
• ASF Email Report.xlsx — the main multi-month workbook (recommended, imports everything at once)
• Any monthly overview xlsx (e.g. August 2023 EmailOverview.xlsx)
• Individual month files with "Sheet1" naming (month detected from data)

Drop any .xlsx email report file here or click to browse

All month sheets found in the file will be imported
Processing...
💡 Workflow tip: Run generate-history.py once to pre-load all your historical xlsx files automatically. After that, use Import Month in the nav for any new month — no need to touch history again.
